name: terminal-guru
description: Terminal diagnostics, configuration, zsh development, system observability, and environment composition expert for macOS/Unix systems. Includes an orchestrator agent for diagnostic triage and four focused skills: terminal-emulation (terminfo, Unicode, display), zsh-dev (autoload functions, fpath, testing, performance), signals-monitoring (macOS logging, Unix signals, file watching, notifications), and environment-composition (sesh.toml config, claude CLI integration, direnv, worktree workflows).
